description_long: This is a heavy, rectangular safe box with a robust, industrial appearance, finished in a dark, matte color with visible scuff marks and signs of wear. The front features a prominent door with a combination dial lock, a rotating handle, and a secondary smaller handle, all made of metal. The door is labeled with the text 'SPECTOR SAFE CO.' and an address in New York, as well as a nameplate reading 'Z. R. GOFFEN.' at the top. The hinges are external and mounted on the left side of the door, providing secure and reinforced support. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or features, emphasizing the object's solid construction. The overall design suggests a secure, tamper-resistant container intended for storing valuables in urban environments such as offices, shops, or garages.
description: A large, dark, industrial safe box with a combination dial, rotating handle, and visible external hinges, featuring worn surfaces and manufacturer labeling.
description_view_0: The back of the safe box, showing a plain, dark, slightly worn surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The right side of the safe box, plain and featureless except for a small protruding handle near the front edge.
description_view_2: The front of the safe box, displaying the main door with a combination dial, rotating handle, manufacturer label, and external hinges on the left.
description_view_3: The left side of the safe box, plain and solid, with the external hinges of the door visible near the front edge.
attribute_handle_design: rotating T-shaped metal handle on the door, with a smaller cylindrical secondary handle
attribute_brand_or_manufacturer_label: Printed label on the front door: 'SPECTOR SAFE CO. 324 GRAND ST. NEW YORK, N.Y.' and 'Z. R. GOFFEN.' at the top, in white text
